message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add missing patterns for common agent/runtime artifacts that should never
be committed: storage.sqlite3, rustc-ice-*.txt, a.out, perf.data,
target-codex*/, target_*/, --graph-format.svg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,15 @@ __pycache__/
 .beads/
 .bv/
 
+# Ephemeral agent/runtime artifacts
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+a.out
+--graph-format.svg
+target-codex*/
+target_*/
+
 # Legacy oracle checkout (upstream source mirror, not project code)
 legacy_pandas_code/
